message:
feat(hybrid): add TwoTierMetrics for search performance analysis

Add metrics collection and logging for two-tier progressive search:

TwoTierMetrics struct:
- query: Search query (truncated for privacy)
- fast_latency_ms: Time for hash-based fast phase
- refine_latency_ms: Time for quality embedding refinement (optional)
- total_latency_ms: End-to-end search time
- rank_correlation: Kendall tau between fast/quality rankings (-1 to 1)
- items_promoted: Results that moved up after refinement
- items_demoted: Results that moved down after refinement
- skip_reason: Why quality phase was skipped (if applicable)
- daemon_used: Whether embedding daemon was used
- blend_factor: Fast/quality blend ratio (0.0 to 1.0)
- result_count: Number of results returned
- timestamp: UTC timestamp

SkipReason enum:
- FastOnly (blend_factor = 0.0)
- NoQualityEmbedding
- BelowThreshold
- Error(String)

MetricsLogger:
- JSONL append to configurable metrics file
- Non-blocking: errors logged but don't fail search
- Useful for tuning blend_factor and analyzing search quality

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
